languages.text: Небольшое поселение, едва защищенное от нападения врагов, хищников и катаклизмов. Население только начинает осваивать ресурсы планеты, молясь, чтобы неведомая угроза не оборвала жизнь молодой колонии.

traits.locale_text: Небольшое поселение, едва защищенное от навпадения врагов, хищников и катаклизмов. Население только начинает осваивать ресурсы планеты, молясь, чтобы неведомая угроза не оборвала жизнь молодой колонии.

Небольшое поселение, едва защищенное от нападения врагов, хищников и катаклизмов. Население только начинает осваивать ресурсы планеты, молясь, чтобы неведомая угроза не оборвала жизнь молодой колонии.

languages.text: A small settlement that is barely protected from pirates, predators, and other calamities. The people are starting to make use of the planet's resources, praying some unseen threat won't sap the life from their meagre colony.
languages.original_text: Небольшое поселение, едва защищенное от нападения врагов, хищников и катаклизмов. Население только начинает осваивать ресурсы планеты, молясь, чтобы неведомая угроза не оборвала жизнь молодой колонии.

traits.locale_text: A small settlement that can barely protect itself from pirates, predators and cataclysms. The people are starting to make use of the planet's resources while hoping their colony can withstand the difficulties.

A small settlement that can barely protect itself from pirates, predators and cataclysms. The people are starting to make use of the planet's resources while hoping their colony can withstand the difficulties.

A small settlement that is barely protected from pirates, predators, and other calamities. The people are starting to make use of the planet's resources, praying some unseen threat won't sap the life from their meagre colony.

A small settlement that is barely protected from pirates, predators, and other calamities. The people are starting to make use of the planet's resources, praying some unseen threat won't sap the life from their meagre colony.

languages.text: Eine kleine Siedlung, die kaum vor Piraten, Raubtieren und anderen Katastrophen geschützt ist. Die Menschen fangen an, die Ressourcen des Planeten zu nutzen und beten, dass eine unsichtbare Bedrohung nicht das Leben ihrer kargen Kolonie auslöscht.
languages.original_text: A small settlement that is barely protected from pirates, predators, and other calamities. The people are starting to make use of the planet's resources, praying some unseen threat won't sap the life from their meagre colony.

traits.locale_text: Eine kleine Siedlung, die kaum vor Piraten, Raubtieren und anderen Katastrophen geschützt ist. Die Menschen fangen an, die Ressourcen des Planeten zu nutzen und beten, dass eine unsichtbare Bedrohung nicht das Leben ihrer kargen Kolonie auslöscht.

languages.text: Une petite colonie à peine protégée des pirates, des prédateurs et autres calamités. Les habitants commencent à exploiter les ressources de la planète, en espérant qu'une menace invisible ne vienne pas saper la vie de leur maigre colonie.
languages.original_text: A small settlement that is barely protected from pirates, predators, and other calamities. The people are starting to make use of the planet's resources, praying some unseen threat won't sap the life from their meagre colony.

traits.locale_text: Une petite colonie à peine protégée des pirates, des prédateurs et autres calamités. Les habitants commencent à exploiter les ressources de la planète, en espérant qu'une menace invisible ne vienne pas saper la vie de leur maigre colonie.

languages.text: Un pequeño asentamiento apenas protegido de piratas, depredadores y otras calamidades. Los habitantes empiezan a aprovechar los recursos del planeta, rezando para que alguna amenaza invisible no acabe con la vida de su exigua colonia.
languages.original_text: A small settlement that is barely protected from pirates, predators, and other calamities. The people are starting to make use of the planet's resources, praying some unseen threat won't sap the life from their meagre colony.

traits.locale_text: Un pequeño asentamiento apenas protegido de piratas, depredadores y otras calamidades. Los habitantes empiezan a aprovechar los recursos del planeta, rezando para que alguna amenaza invisible no acabe con la vida de su exigua colonia.

languages.text: Korsanlardan, yırtıcı hayvanlardan ve diğer felaketlerden zar zor korunan küçük bir yerleşim yeri. İnsanlar gezegenin kaynaklarını kullanmaya başlıyor ve görünmeyen bir tehdidin yetersiz kolonilerindeki yaşamı tüketmemesi için dua ediyor.
languages.original_text: A small settlement that is barely protected from pirates, predators, and other calamities. The people are starting to make use of the planet's resources, praying some unseen threat won't sap the life from their meagre colony.

traits.locale_text: Korsanlardan, yırtıcı hayvanlardan ve diğer felaketlerden zar zor korunan küçük bir yerleşim yeri. İnsanlar gezegenin kaynaklarını kullanmaya başlıyor ve görünmeyen bir tehdidin yetersiz kolonilerindeki yaşamı tüketmemesi için dua ediyor.
